name: Chocolate- Filled Caramel Buns
recipeIngredient: 2 10 Oz. Cans Hungry Jack Refrigeration Flaky Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Grease a 9-inch square pan.
3. Spread frosting evenly over the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Press pecan halves into the frosting.
5. Separate dough into 20 biscuits.
6. Wrap one biscuit around each candy kiss, sealing the edges completely and covering the candy kiss entirely.
7. Arrange the filled biscuits over the frosting and pecans.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 28 to 32 minutes, or until golden brown. Let stand for 3 minutes before serving.
